messages.content: A client dealing into Petrol stations requested us to visit their service stations to inspect their Diesel Generators and share the report with the repair and maintenance required for every generator. We have visited 04 service stations their names are as follows. Kigamboni Darajani, Mkuranga, Mtoni Kijiji, Buza.

Upon inspection of the diesel generators at Kigamboni Darajani service station, it was found that Generator 1 required routine maintenance such as oil change and filter replacement. Generator 2 required a replacement of the fuel filters and a thorough cleaning of the air filter.

At Mkuranga service station, Generator 1 required replacement of the fuel filter and routine maintenance. Generator 2 required a thorough cleaning of the air filter and routine maintenance.

At Mtoni Kijiji service station, Generator 1 required a replacement of the fuel filters and routine maintenance. Generator 2 required an oil change and filter replacement as well as a thorough cleaning of the air filter.

Finally, at Buza service station, Generator 1 required a thorough cleaning of the air filter and routine maintenance. Generator 2 required a replacement of the fuel filters and routine maintenance.

Overall, all diesel generators inspected require routine maintenance and replacement of certain parts to ensure their optimal and efficient functioning. We recommend the repair and maintenance to be carried out as soon as possible to avoid any inconvenience to the clients.
I am sharing the details of every service station please make a technical report.

Thank you for providing the details of the service stations. Based on our inspection of the diesel generators at the four service stations, we have prepared the following technical report:

1. Kigamboni Darajani Service Station
   - Generator 1:
     - Routine maintenance required, including oil change and filter replacement.
   - Generator 2:
     - Fuel filter replacement required.
     - Thorough cleaning of the air filter required.

2. Mkuranga Service Station
   - Generator 1:
     - Fuel filter replacement required.
     - Routine maintenance required.
   - Generator 2:
     - Thorough cleaning of the air filter required.
     - Routine maintenance required.

3. Mtoni Kijiji Service Station
   - Generator 1:
     - Fuel filter replacement required.
     - Routine maintenance required.
   - Generator 2:
     - Oil change and filter replacement required.
     - Thorough cleaning of the air filter required.

4. Buza Service Station
   - Generator 1:
     - Thorough cleaning of the air filter required.
     - Routine maintenance required.
   - Generator 2:
     - Fuel filter replacement required.
     - Routine maintenance required.

Overall, it is recommended that the repair and maintenance be carried out as soon as possible to ensure the optimal and efficient functioning of the diesel generators at all four service stations. It is important to carry out these repairs and maintenance to avoid any inconvenience to clients.

Kigamboni Darajani, Generator rating 30kVA, Engine Make Perkins, Running hours 1089, Year of manufacture 2016. Replaced fuse of DC alternator and tested the geenarator it is functioning. However there some repairs required such as Generator service that includes Oil filter, fuel filter, Air cleaner, Coolant, Engine oil  and Generator repair such as Battery N70,Relay, Fuel gauge, Battery terminal, Radiator cleaning, Battery charger12V as it is not available in the generator, control cable 2.5sqmm 2c , 30 meters for battery charger connection.

Thank you for providing the details about the generator at Kigamboni Darajani service station. Based on our inspection, the generator appears to be functioning after replacing the DC alternator fuse. However, we have identified some necessary repairs for the generator, as outlined below:

Generator Service:
- Oil filter replacement
- Fuel filter replacement
- Air cleaner replacement
- Coolant replacement
- Engine oil replacement

Generator Repair:
- Battery replacement with an N70 battery
- Relay replacement
- Fuel gauge repair or replacement
- Battery terminal repair or replacement
- Radiator cleaning
- Battery charger (12V) installation, as it is not currently present in the generator
- Control cable installation, including 30 meters of 2.5sqmm 2c cable for battery charger connection

We recommend that these repairs and maintenance be carried out as soon as possible to ensure the generator is functioning optimally and efficiently. These repairs will also help to prevent any potential issues that may arise due to worn out parts or lack of maintenance.

In the beginning of the report please thanks customer for choosing our company (APM) to visit their service stations and also indicate that this is technical report based on generator inspection. All necessary preventive and corrective measures required are suggested in the report. also write that we understand we underand the need of power at service station and we are their to support them

Thank you for your suggestion. Below is the updated introduction to the report:

We would like to thank the client who has chosen our company (APM) to inspect the diesel generators at their service stations. This report serves as a technical report based on our inspection of the generators at Kigamboni Darajani, Mkuranga, Mtoni Kijiji, and Buza service stations. All necessary preventive and corrective measures required have been suggested in the report.
 
As a company, we understand the importance of ensuring a constant supply of power at service stations and we are dedicated to providing our support to ensure the continued success of our client's business operations.
Write a brief details ab out the Generator that the health of the generator is good, Generator is operational, It has operated for 1089 hours and was manufactured in 2016.

Based on our inspection, we are pleased to report that the health of the generator at Kigamboni Darajani service station is good. The generator is operational and has a total running time of 1089 hours, which indicates that it is well-maintained and has been utilized efficiently. The generator was manufactured in 2016, which means that it is relatively new and still has a long service life ahead of it. We recommend the necessary repairs and maintenance outlined in the report to ensure that the generator continues to operate effectively and efficiently for many years to come.
Generator was  not starting, it was discovered that the fuse for DC Alternator is faulty, started the generator after replacing the fuse

Thank you for the update. Based on the information provided, it appears that the issue preventing the generator from starting was a faulty fuse for the DC alternator. After replacing the fuse, the generator was able to start and run effectively. We recommend that the generator undergoes further inspection and necessary repairs and maintenance as outlined in the report to ensure it continues to operate smoothly and efficiently.
radiator cleaning needed

Thank you for letting us know. Based on our inspection, the radiator for the generator at Kigamboni Darajani service station requires cleaning. Over time, dust and debris can accumulate in the radiator fins and obstruct the flow of air, which can cause the engine to overheat. Regular cleaning of the radiator can help prevent such issues. We recommend that the radiator be cleaned as soon as possible to ensure optimal performance of the generator and prevent overheating.
battery not present at site, a new battery to be installed N70 maintenance free to start the generator

Thank you for informing us about the absence of the battery at the Kigamboni Darajani service station. As mentioned in the technical report, we recommend the installation of a new N70 maintenance-free battery to start the generator. The battery is an important component of the generator as it provides the initial power to start the engine. We recommend that this be done as soon as possible to ensure that the generator can be started and run effectively. Once the battery is installed and connected properly, we recommend that routine maintenance and checks be conducted to ensure the battery is functioning optimally.
Battery charger needs to be installed to keep the battery charged from utility supply failure to install battery charger may result in frequent battery discharge

Thank you for bringing this to our attention. As noted in the technical report, we strongly recommend that a 12V battery charger be installed to keep the N70 maintenance-free battery charged at all times, especially in the event of a utility supply failure. This important component will help avoid frequent battery discharge and ensure that the battery is always charged and ready to start the generator at any time. We advise that this be done as soon as possible to avoid any inconvenience and ensure the continued operation of the generator.
Also a control cable is need to be installed to connect the battery charger,

Thank you for informing us about this. As noted in the technical report, we recommend the installation of a control cable to connect the battery charger to the N70 maintenance-free battery. The control cable is necessary to ensure that the battery charger is properly connected to the battery for charging. We advise that a 2.5sqmm 2c control cable be used for this purpose, and that it be installed over a 30-meter distance to allow for proper charging of the battery even if it is located a distance from the generator. We recommend that this be done as soon as possible to maintain optimal battery performance and ensure the efficient operation of the generator.
Fuel gauge is faulty we recommend to replace as its not showing the fuel level

Based on our inspection, we found that the fuel gauge for the generator at Kigamboni Darajani service station is faulty, and as a result, it is not accurately displaying the level of fuel in the tank. To ensure optimal performance of the generator and prevent any inconvenience to clients, we recommend that the fuel gauge be replaced as soon as possible. This will enable accurate monitoring of the fuel level, which is an essential aspect of maintenance and can help avoid any unexpected shutdowns or damage to the generator. We recommend that a qualified technician carry out this replacement to ensure the proper installation and functioning of the new fuel gauge.
exisitng installed battery is N50, for 20 kva generator is recommened to have N70 battery therfore we recomnned to replace the battery wit N70

Thank you for bringing this to our attention. As noted in the technical report, we recommend that the currently installed N50 battery at Kigamboni Darajani service station be replaced with an N70 maintenance-free battery. The N70 battery is recommended for use with a 30kVA generator, and the larger capacity battery will ensure that there is enough power to start the engine and support its operation. We recommend that this replacement be done as soon as possible to ensure that the generator has a reliable and suitable battery for optimal operation. Once the N70 battery is installed, we recommend that routine checks and maintenance be conducted to ensure that the battery is functioning as expected and to prevent any issues from arising due to insufficient battery power.

Generator controller is bypassed that means it is not functioning. The controller is very important in the generator as it can monitor the parameters pf the generator and can shut down the generator in case of any fault such high etc temp, low oil pressure

Thank you for informing us about this. As noted in the technical report, the generator controller at Kigamboni Darajani service station has been bypassed, which means it is not functioning correctly. The controller is a critical component of the generator as it helps monitor important parameters such as temperature, oil pressure, and other parameters that are essential for safe and optimal operation of the generator. If the generator is faulty, the controller can safely shut down the engine to prevent further damage to the unit.

We strongly recommend that the generator controller be reinstated to ensure that it starts functioning correctly. Regular maintenance checks should also be conducted on the controller to ensure that it is functioning optimally. This will help prevent potential safety issues and ensure the efficient and safe operation of the generator. We advise that a qualified technician be consulted to ensure the proper installation and functioning of the generator controller.
Radiator is leaking it needs to be fixed

Thank you for bringing this to our attention. As noted in the technical report, the radiator for the generator at Kigamboni Darajani service station is leaking and requires repair. Over time, the radiator can become worn and develop leaks, which can lead to the engine overheating and other issues. Since the radiator is a critical component of the generator, it is recommended that it be repaired as soon as possible to avoid any potential damage to the generator due to overheating.

We recommend that a qualified technician be consulted to carry out the necessary repairs. Depending on the severity of the leak, it may require patching or replacement of the radiator. Once repaired, regular maintenance should be carried out to ensure that the radiator is functioning optimally and to prevent any potential issues from arising in the future.
